title: Playground Lesson Path Workspace
concept: A modal-free onboarding checklist workspace that lets first-time WordPress learners discover Playground capabilities in sequence while keeping the live WordPress site visible.
focus: Site Manager tools reframed as learning benches
flows: choose a launch source from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import
save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible progress and resulting saved state
manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename and delete actions
change settings with reset and reload consequences visible
browse files, inspect and run a Blueprint bundle, inspect database tools, and review logs
search, filter, select, inspect, and run Blueprint gallery entries
export to GitHub, download as zip, and import a zip over the current site
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
